title: nasturtium africanum subsp. mesatlanticum
intro: Nasturtium africanum subsp. mesatlanticum, also known as African watercress, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of African watercress include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for overall well-being. In herbal preparations, African watercress can be consumed as a tea, used in salads, or applied topically as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
